title: crabbea longipes
intro: Crabbea longipes, also known as the "firecracker plant," is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever and other inflammatory conditions due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Crabbea longipes include reducing body temperature, alleviating pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Crabbea longipes can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant's extracts in tinctures or ointments, which can be applied topically or taken orally.
